dialogos.texto_en: Ichika, I'm here.
Hey.\nSorry for keeping you waiting.\nI'll finish changing soon, so please wait there.
It looks like they've arrived.
Good grief, what are they plotting?\nThey haven't changed since high school.\nThey're all troublemakers.
Does that include me too?
Yes, you too! Actually, you troubled me the most.
(Come to think of it, I had a dream this morning.)
(How many times have I dreamt of that day?\n It's etched so deeply into my mind.)
(It was such a terrible nightmare.)
Sorry to keep you waiting.
Am I still dreaming?
It's the final quintuplets game.
If you love me, you can tell us apart, right?
Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for taking time\nout of your busy schedules\nto attend our wedding reception today.
I am very happy to finally have our wedding ceremony\nin front of everyone who has supported us so far.
It...really has been a long road.
The quintuplets game...
What a joke! Except for Ichika, you other four!
What are you doing, wearing wedding dresses\nfor this kind of game?\nDo you even know what you're doing?
Sure, it's a bit complicated...
But we just thought of it, you know...
And it's not just for fun.
We're also relatives of the bride.
Well, that's a lie.\nI'm the bride.
No. It's me.
I'm the bride!
You can tell, right, Futaro?
Geez, you idiots...\nJust when I thought\nyou'd become somewhat sensible adults.
It's a relief you still haven't changed.\nDon't underestimate me.
It's you.
It seems the party is at its peak,\nbut it looks like it's time to wrap things up.
Lastly, a message of gratitude\nfrom the bride to her parents.
To my father, and my mother in heaven,\nI would not be here today\nif it weren't for the both of you.
Although my mother left me when I was young,\nher teachings and her love will always stay with me.
And, Dad.
I know there were times when you were unsure\nabout accepting our relationship,\nbut you've watched over us until today.
Still, until now, thank you for watching over us\njust as we are%p-2;――
And, thank you for supporting me\nas I discovered my dream of becoming an actress.
And to my sisters,\nyou've always been a source of strength\nin helping me achieve my dreams.
Huh? Me?
You're Nino.
The next quintuplet, Nino, sometimes pulls me along\nlike an older sister.
She always lives true to herself no matter what%p-2;――
I always admired her way of life.
Yup, that's correct!
Well, well. Good job.\nNext, please!
Why, at a time like this...
You just need to identify Ichika.
Your strength is in your compassion for others. \nEven though you act tough, I suppose it's because \nyou have so much love to give.
I couldn't find the answer at that time.\nI'm sorry.
It's okay...\nI...have no regrets...
I see.
What the hell is this...\nWhy, all of a sudden...
While we're at it.\nLet me say what I have to say.
Next, you're Miku.
Miku is my little sister and yet at the same time,\nmy best friend. We've always told each other what was \non our minds and been by each other's side.
Miku has the strength to change herself for her dreams.\nShe's my pride and joy as a little sister.
Yes, you're correct.
Sometimes I get worried...\nAm I...doing okay...?
There's no need for me to even answer that.
You've always fought against your insecurities. \nAnd as a result you've accomplished so much and more.
Believe in yourself.\nYou are and always have been capable of great things.
I thought you'd say that.\nThank you, Futaro.
Yotsuba.
...Yes.
Yotsuba is the sister I've been the closest to\nas an older sister.\nBesides, being so unbelievably cute that I can't help it.
Of course, there are many things\nI've been taught by you as well, Yotsuba.
There's something reliable about\nwatching you run forward with all your might.
You keep helping people, even now.\nThat's because it's what you want to do, right?
I'm sorry for being presumptuous, but I hope you\ncontinue to be that kind of person in the future.\nAs someone who was helped by you, I wish for that.
Of course.\nIt's the path I've chosen and walked on my own.
Please don't say that it's presumptuous of you.\nI'm happy to know that I'm being acknowledged.
Yeah.
And finally, Itsuki.
Eeh.
Eeh.
Uuum, it's Ichika, ya know?
Itsuki, despite being the youngest,\nyou're the most dependable among the five of us.\nYou've always helped me out.
You always try your best at all times,\nand a bit stubborn at times%p-2;――
Now, you're living your dream as a teacher,\nhelping and guiding numerous students every day.
Juuust kidding!
Ta-da! It is me, Itsuki!\nHow was that? Did I do well?
Even now...teasing me like this...
I'm gonna say this now while I got the chance!
You're the reason my life went off the rails!\nIt was all in meeting you!
The root of all evil! The curry-loving yokai woman!
...!\nW-well, I never!
Before I met you, I could have never imagined\nthat there could be someone so lacking in\ndelicacy! You smart-ass! Compulsive kissing dummy!
I just don't think we'll ever get along, you and I!
Itsuki's...using her old way of speaking again.
Well, it's to be expected with Futaro around.
Aargh... Geez...
And, the last one is you, Ichika.\nYep. I got a perfect score.
Huuuh?\nReally? That was really easy, wasn't it.
If it weren't for my sisters,\nmy life would have been completely different.
There were times when being the eldest\nfelt like a burden, but they've made each day \na hundred times more enjoyable.
You can't help but grow when you've been together this long. \nI may have been the tutor at first but I've learned so much from all of you.
I'm happy that I was able to be born\nas a sister of quintuplets.\nAnd as your older sister, it's been a blessing.
Meeting you quintuplets is one of my proudest achievements.
There may be many things\nthat people find strange about us, but%p-2;――
I love my family, so much.
